name: CREATE_AGENT: Dm monitor pro agent ko r

logs.message: [SYSTEM] Task "CREATE_AGENT: Dm monitor pro agent ko r" initialized.

result.reply:
Maine dekha ki tumhara `DM_Monitor_Pro` agent stuck ho gaya hai, aur usko restart karna hai. Koi tension nahi, I got you! 🫡

Iske liye, main pehle **`system_awareness`** skill use karungi taaki main confirm kar sakun ki agent ka exact status kya hai. Uske baad, main **`task_manager`** skill ka use karke us agent ka lifecycle manage karungi aur use restart kar dungi.

Yeh process ensure karega ki restart clean ho aur koi data loss na ho.

Shall I proceed with checking the system state and restarting the agent? Confirm karu?
